content.text: I'll run through the heartbeat checks. Let me start with the state reads and script executions that can run in parallel.

arguments.command: cat state/health-state.json 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat state/agent-status.json 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat state/chg-triggers.json 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat state/standby-mode.json 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat state/system-banner.json 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat state/heartbeat-state.json 2>/dev/null
